employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hazelcast group configuration with cluster name configuration.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: Hazelcast 4.x removed GroupConfig; using it causes compilation errors or runtime failures as the API no longer exists.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hazelcast group configuration with cluster name configuration in server config.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: Hazelcast 4.x removed GroupConfig; using it causes compilation errors or runtime failures as the API no longer exists.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Update ManagementCenterConfig to use new API for enabling the console.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: The old setUrl/setEnabled pattern may be deprecated or removed in newer Hazelcast versions, requiring the new setConsoleEnabled API.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 (and Jakarta EE 9+) removed the javax.persistence package; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java EE/Jakarta EE migration; code fails to compile without jakarta.annotation.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Update Hazelcast IMap import from core to map package to match API changes in newer Hazelcast versions.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: com.hazelcast.core.IMap is deprecated/removed in favor of com.hazelcast.map.IMap in newer Hazelcast versions; compilation fails.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Update addIndex call to use explicit IndexType enum instead of boolean flag to match new Hazelcast API.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: map.addIndex(String, boolean) signature is removed or changed in newer Hazelcast; compilation error.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace deprecated Predicates.equal with PredicateBuilder API for constructing queries.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: Predicates class is removed or deprecated in newer Hazelcast versions; compilation error.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.after:
PredicateBuilder.EntryObject eo = new PredicateBuilderImpl().getEntryObject();
		Predicate predicate = eo.get("personId").equal(personId);

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace deprecated Predicates.equal with PredicateBuilder API for constructing queries in findByCompany.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: Predicates class is removed or deprecated in newer Hazelcast versions; compilation error.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.after:
PredicateBuilder.EntryObject eo = new PredicateBuilderImpl().getEntryObject();
		Predicate predicate = eo.get("company").equal(company);

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace deprecated repository.findOne with findById to align with Spring Data JPA 2.x+ API.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: findOne method is removed in Spring Data JPA 2.0+; compilation error.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 annotations and runner.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner (@RunWith) and annotations (@Test from org.junit) are incompatible with JUnit 5 platform used by Spring Boot 3; tests will fail to execute or compile without migration.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace static SpringRunner with Testcontainers integration for database testing.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: SpringRunner is deprecated/removed in favor of JUnit 5 integration; Testcontainers requires specific annotations (@Testcontainers, @Container) to function correctly in the new test lifecycle.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Configure dynamic datasource properties for the Testcontainer.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires explicit property binding for dynamic test resources; without DynamicPropertySource, the application context won't connect to the ephemeral container.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Refactor Hazelcast bean configuration to return ClientConfig instead of HazelcastInstance, likely to delegate instance creation to Spring Boot auto-configuration in Spring Boot 3.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 / Spring Integration 6 changes how Hazelcast instances are managed; manually creating a HazelcastInstance bean may conflict with auto-configuration or require different bean types for proper lifecycle management.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Remove explicit CacheManager bean definition, relying on Spring Boot auto-configuration to create it from the Hazelcast instance.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 auto-configuration for Hazelcast caching expects specific bean types or configurations; manually defining HazelcastCacheManager might cause conflicts or fail if the underlying HazelcastInstance is not available as a bean in the expected way.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation imports to jakarta.annotation to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments required by Spring Boot 3.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace deprecated CrudRepository.findOne() with findById().orElseThrow() to align with Spring Data JPA 2.4+ API.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Compile error: method findOne(Integer) is undefined for type CrudRepository in newer Spring Data versions.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 (and Jakarta EE 9+) removed the javax.persistence package; using it causes a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 annotations and imports.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner and annotations are incompatible with JUnit 5 platform used in Spring Boot 3; compilation fails due to missing classes.
SpringRunner class is part of JUnit 4 integration which is removed in Spring Boot 3; compilation fails.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Add Testcontainers support for MySQL and Hazelcast to replace static test environment configuration.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 test context requires explicit property configuration for external dependencies; without this, tests fail to connect to databases/services.
